'''竏嗾-ch-h-z''' ('''katachezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cadaverise|cadaverise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ch-h-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cadaverise|cadaverise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗾-ch-h-z
|-
! Lemma
| katachezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitachezoko|thitachezoko]] || [[word:jitachezoko|jitachezoko]] || [[word:shitachezoko|shitachezoko]] || [[word:kitachezoko|kitachezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
